name: Locize Localization Management API
what_it_does: Developer-first localization platform with REST API — providing real-time translation management for web and mobile apps, built natively on i18next, enabling in-context editing, version management, CDN delivery of translation files, and integration with CAT tools for professional translation workflows.
use_cases: Delivering translation files via CDN to web apps without redeploy on content changes
Programmatically adding and updating translation keys from code via API
Querying translation coverage and missing key reports for localization pipeline tracking
Integrating Locize with professional translation agency workflows via webhook
Managing translation namespaces and versions for multi-environment deployments
not_for: Machine translation at scale without human review (use DeepL or Google Translate API)
Document translation for legal or compliance purposes
Large enterprises needing enterprise TMS with full workflow management (use Phrase or Smartling)
best_when: A development team using i18next wants a hosted translation management service with real-time delivery, in-context editing for translators, and developer-friendly API without managing translation files in git.
avoid_when: You don't use i18next, need enterprise TMS features (use Phrase or Lokalise), or want full ownership of translation files in your own infrastructure.

auth.notes: API key from Locize project settings. Passed as Authorization header. Project ID and version required in API path. Read-only API key available for public CDN access. Write API key for management operations. No OAuth2. Webhook for translation update events.

pricing.notes: Swiss company (Zurich). Founded 2017. Built by i18next creators. Native i18next integration with real-time delivery. In-context editor for translators without dev involvement. CDN delivery of JSON translation files. Translation history and version management. Affordable pricing with word-count-based tiers.

performance.rate_limits: Write API rate limited; CDN reads are unlimited

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for namespaces, languages, keys, and translations. Two API keys: read-only (CDN) and write (management). Project ID and version required in URL path. Good documentation. CDN delivery is fast global edge. Write operations create translation audit log. Webhook for translation updates.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Translation reads fully idempotent. Key reads idempotent. Adding/updating keys is idempotent by key name. CDN delivery is idempotent. Namespace reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Two API keys: read-only for CDN delivery, write key for management — use appropriate one
Project ID and version required in URL path — not just headers
CDN-delivered translations are cached — propagation delay after updates
Word count billing — track word count before bulk imports to avoid surprise costs
i18next namespace structure must match project namespace configuration

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency (Switzerland). Read and write API keys with separate permissions. Swiss company with strict data protection standards. Translation content may include sensitive product or legal copy — secure write key.
